sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81891" key="periph/lwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιπήλ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n81891.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">encasing in clay</tr_>, Zos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2589.tlg001:p.135B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.135B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
